title: Implement Professional Artifact Display System for AI Chat
description: Transform the AI chat interface from a single-panel markdown-only display into a professional split-panel layout where the left side shows conversational chat and the right side renders structured artifacts (financial reports, charts, tables, metrics) using pre-built React components. The AI will return structured JSON with artifact definitions, and the UI will render them with appropriate visualizations using Recharts for charts and custom components for tables/metrics.
why: Transform AI-generated financial insights into presentation-quality reports that match professional accounting software output, enabling confident decision-making by accountants and business owners who expect polished financial visualizations, not raw text in chat bubbles.

tasks.title: Install Recharts and define artifact TypeScript types
tasks.description: Add recharts dependency to packages/ai/package.json. Create packages/ai/app/lib/artifacts/types.ts with TypeScript interfaces: Artifact (id, title, type, data), MetricData, TableData, ChartData, BalanceSheetData, TrialBalanceData. Define ArtifactType union type.

tasks.title: Create SplitPanelLayout component
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/layout/split-panel-layout.tsx implementing responsive split-panel layout. Desktop: chat 60% left, artifacts 40% right. Mobile (<768px): full-width chat with drawer/modal for artifacts. Include collapse/expand toggle. Use Tailwind for responsive breakpoints.

tasks.title: Create MetricCard component
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/metric-card.tsx displaying single KPI values. Props: label, value, trend (up/down/neutral), comparison (optional previous value/percentage). Use shadcn Card, format numbers with locale-aware currency/percentage formatting.

tasks.title: Create DataTable component
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/data-table.tsx for tabular data. Features: sortable columns (click header), optional pagination, financial formatting (currency with locale, percentages). Props: columns, data, sortable, pageSize. Use Tailwind table styling.

tasks.title: Create PieChart component with Recharts
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/pie-chart.tsx using Recharts PieChart. Features: labels, tooltips, legend, responsive container. Props: data (array of {name, value}), colors (optional). Use ResponsiveContainer for auto-sizing.

tasks.title: Create BarChart component with Recharts
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/bar-chart.tsx using Recharts BarChart. Features: axis labels, tooltips, optional stacking, legend. Props: data, xKey, yKeys[], stacked (boolean), colors. Use ResponsiveContainer.

tasks.title: Create LineChart component with Recharts
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/line-chart.tsx using Recharts LineChart. Features: axis labels, tooltips, multiple series support, legend. Props: data, xKey, yKeys[], colors. Time-series aware X-axis formatting.

tasks.title: Create BalanceSheet artifact renderer
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/balance-sheet.tsx for professional balance sheet display. Sections: Assets (Current/Non-Current), Liabilities (Current/Non-Current), Equity. Features: proper indentation, subtotals, grand totals, currency formatting. Match accounting report conventions.

tasks.title: Create TrialBalance artifact renderer
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/trial-balance.tsx for trial balance display. Columns: Account Code, Account Name, Debit, Credit. Features: balanced totals row at bottom, currency formatting, visual indication if unbalanced.

tasks.title: Create ArtifactPanel with tabs/cards for multiple artifacts
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/artifact-panel.tsx as container for displaying artifacts. Features: tabs when multiple artifacts, stacked cards view option, artifact type icon, title display. Uses ArtifactRenderer to dispatch to correct component.

tasks.title: Update anthropic.server.ts system prompt for artifact generation
tasks.description: Modify packages/ai/app/lib/anthropic.server.ts buildSystemPrompt() to instruct Claude to return structured artifacts array when generating financial reports. Define artifact JSON schema in prompt. Include examples for balance sheet, trial balance, charts.

tasks.title: Update ActionResponse and runWithTools to include artifacts
tasks.description: Modify packages/ai/app/routes/_index.tsx ActionResponse interface to include optional artifacts array. Update RunWithToolsResult in anthropic.server.ts. Parse artifact JSON from Claude response text (look for ```artifacts code block or structured JSON).

tasks.title: Integrate split-panel layout into main chat page
tasks.description: Refactor packages/ai/app/routes/_index.tsx ChatPage to use SplitPanelLayout. Left panel: existing MessageList and input form. Right panel: ArtifactPanel with current artifacts. Pass artifacts from actionData to ArtifactPanel. Handle collapse state.

tasks.title: Run TypeScript compilation and fix errors
tasks.description: Run 'bun run typecheck' in packages/ai directory. Fix any TypeScript errors in artifact-related files. Ensure all imports resolve correctly. Verify no type conflicts with React 19 / Recharts.
tasks.notes: Fixed Recharts PieLabelRenderProps type compatibility issue. Pre-existing errors in other packages (canonical, data) unrelated to this story.

tasks.title: Test dev server and verify UI functionality
tasks.description: Start dev server with 'bun --bun run dev' in packages/ai. Verify: split-panel renders, chat functions correctly, artifact panel shows/hides appropriately. Test responsive behavior at <768px. Test with mock artifacts to verify all renderers work.
tasks.notes: Dev server starts successfully on port 5175. HTML served correctly with all Tailwind CSS and component imports.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Split-panel layout renders with chat on left (60% width) and artifact panel on right (40% width) on desktop viewports
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: SplitPanelLayout component created with w-[60%] and w-[40%] classes for desktop. Dev server renders correctly.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Artifact panel is collapsible/hidden when no artifacts are present, expanding chat to full width
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: showRightPanel prop controls visibility. When false (no artifacts), left panel expands to w-full via isCollapsed state.

acceptanceCriteria.description: On mobile viewports (< 768px), artifacts display inline within chat or in a modal/drawer overlay
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: SplitPanelLayout implements mobile detection with drawer overlay. Fixed button at bottom-right opens drawer, backdrop dismisses it.

acceptanceCriteria.description: AIResponse interface includes optional artifacts array with Artifact type containing id, title, type, and data fields
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: types.ts defines Artifact interface with id, title, type (ArtifactType), data (ArtifactData). RunWithToolsResult includes artifacts?: Artifact[].

acceptanceCriteria.description: MetricCard component renders single KPI values with label, value, optional trend indicator, and optional comparison
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: metric-card.tsx created with MetricData interface supporting label, value, trend (up/down/neutral), percentageChange, previousValue.

acceptanceCriteria.description: DataTable component renders tabular data with sortable columns, optional pagination, and proper financial formatting (currency, percentages)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: data-table.tsx implements sortable columns (asc/desc/none), pagination with pageSize, formatCellValue for currency/percentage/number types.

acceptanceCriteria.description: PieChart component (using Recharts) renders categorical data with labels, tooltips, and legend
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: pie-chart.tsx uses Recharts PieChart with Pie, Cell, Tooltip, Legend components. ResponsiveContainer for auto-sizing.

acceptanceCriteria.description: BarChart component (using Recharts) renders comparative data with axis labels, tooltips, and optional stacking
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: bar-chart.tsx uses Recharts BarChart with Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend. stackId prop enables stacking.

acceptanceCriteria.description: LineChart component (using Recharts) renders time-series data with axis labels, tooltips, and multiple series support
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: line-chart.tsx uses Recharts LineChart with Line components for each yKey. Supports multiple series via yKeys array.

acceptanceCriteria.description: BalanceSheet artifact type renders with Assets/Liabilities/Equity sections, proper indentation, and totals
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: balance-sheet.tsx renders currentAssets, nonCurrentAssets, currentLiabilities, nonCurrentLiabilities, equity sections with Section component. Shows subtotals and balanced indicator.

acceptanceCriteria.description: TrialBalance artifact type renders with Account/Debit/Credit columns and balanced totals row
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: trial-balance.tsx renders table with accountCode, accountName, debit, credit columns. Footer shows totalDebit, totalCredit with isBalanced indicator.

acceptanceCriteria.description: When multiple artifacts are generated, artifact panel shows tabs or stacked cards to navigate between them
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: artifact-panel.tsx implements tabs view (default) and stacked cards view toggle. Tab buttons with icons for each artifact type.

acceptanceCriteria.description: anthropic.server.ts updated to instruct Claude to return artifacts array when generating financial reports
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: buildSystemPrompt() updated with ARTIFACT GENERATION section defining JSON schema, artifact types, and when to generate them.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Action response type updated to include artifacts in the response shape returned to client
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: ActionResponse interface includes artifacts?: Artifact[]. parseArtifacts() function extracts ```artifacts code blocks. runWithTools returns artifacts.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Recharts library installed and configured in packages/ai/package.json
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: bun add recharts completed. recharts@3.5.0 added to dependencies in package.json.

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors for all artifact-related files
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: bun run typecheck passes for artifact files. Only pre-existing errors in other packages (canonical/data module resolution).

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dev server starts successfully and split-panel UI loads without errors
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: bun --bun run dev starts on port 5175. curl http://localhost:5175 returns valid HTML with Tailwind CSS and component references.

decisions.description: Use ```artifacts code block format for AI to return structured artifact data, parsed via regex
decisions.rationale: Allows clean separation of conversational text from structured data. Easy to parse and extend.

decisions.description: Implement both tabs and stacked cards view modes for artifact panel
decisions.rationale: Users may prefer different views depending on artifact count and comparison needs.

learnings.description: Recharts PieLabelRenderProps has optional properties that need null checking

q1.question: Why do we need an artifact display system?
q1.answer: When AI generates financial reports (balance sheet, trial balance, charts), they appear as raw text/markdown in the chat, which is hard to read and doesn't leverage visual presentation capabilities.

q2.question: Why is raw text problematic for financial data?
q2.answer: Financial data needs structure: tables with aligned columns, charts for trends, metric cards for KPIs. Markdown tables in a chat bubble don't communicate the same authority and clarity as properly rendered financial reports.

q3.question: Why does presentation clarity matter for MoneyWorks users?
q3.answer: MoneyWorks users are accountants and business owners making financial decisions. Professional reports inspire confidence and enable faster comprehension - they're used to Excel/PDF reports, not chat bubbles.

q4.question: Why can't we just improve markdown rendering?
q4.answer: Markdown has limits: no interactive charts, no drill-down tables, no proper financial formatting (currency, percentages). We need component-based rendering with Recharts for data visualization.

q5.question: What is the fundamental need?
q5.answer: Transform AI-generated financial insights into presentation-quality reports that match professional accounting software output, enabling confident decision-making.

fiveWhysAnalysis.rootCause: Bridge the gap between AI text output and professional financial report presentation to enable confident business decisions

referenceImplementation.relevance: Current single-panel chat implementation to be transformed into split-panel layout
